{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Gar Kilian
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Gar Kilian]] specializes in [[binding]] magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
